mechanism_narrative: A 5-month growth acceleration in the US GDP signals an expansion in aggregate demand that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in growth acceleration periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a recession.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production signals a supply-side shock that compresses profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in supply-side shock periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a monetary tightening cycle.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a labor market downturn that boosts risk-free rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in labor market downturn periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a late-cycle expansion.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month acceleration in housing starts signals an expansion in residential investment that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in housing starts acceleration periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a recession.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in the federal funds rate signals a monetary tightening cycle that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in monetary tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a late-cycle expansion.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in payroll employment signals a labor market downturn that boosts risk-free rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in labor market downturn periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a late-cycle expansion.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month acceleration in real disposable personal income signals an expansion in aggregate demand that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in real disposable personal income acceleration periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a recession.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in the CPI signals an inflationary regime that boosts risk-free rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in inflationary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism's direction flips in a late-cycle expansion.
